generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2024 Boston plot was stopped because we had the tools to track these networks. Critics say 'but what about civil liberties?' - but we're talking about targeted surveillance of known threats, not mass spying. The system works when we let professionals do their jobs. #NationalSecurityMatters
